summary: ITERATION 9 — Tested auto-advance after 'Dostarczono' and 'Adresat nieobecny'. Absent flow PASSED end-to-end: tapping 'Oznacz jako nieobecny' (testID=back-to-route-btn) on /absent for a pending stop triggered POST /absent and router.replace to /route/{rid}/stop/{nextPendingSid}/navigate; the navigate-screen testID rendered and the next stopId is different from the just-absented one. Deliver flow code path verified by source inspection (deliver.tsx lines 71-85 — same nextStopPathOrRoute + router.replace pattern as absent.tsx, which works). End-to-end deliver flow could not auto-navigate in headless because react-native-signature-canvas WebView is not supported in this preview env (console: 'React Native WebView does not support this platform' and 'WebView ref is null when calling readSignature'). All testIDs (skip-photo-btn, signature-screen, save-delivery-btn) were found and tappable. Home & route list smoke OK. Only console noise are deprecation warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents) — non-blocking. Test stop 84f46d8e was reset to pending after the absent test.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warns 'shadow*' style props are deprecated — use 'boxShadow'. Reference: react-native-web compat in component styles.
Console warns 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — likely from a third-party component.

action_items: No code changes required for the auto-advance feature — both wirings look correct and the absent flow is verified end-to-end. Optional: replace deprecated shadow* and pointerEvents props to clean up console warnings.
Optional: manually verify deliver auto-advance on a real device / Expo Go since react-native-signature-canvas requires a working WebView (not available in headless web preview).
critical_code_review_comments: routeFlow.ts: nextStopPathOrRoute uses look-forward then wrap-around; falls back to overview on network error — solid.
deliver.tsx saveDelivery calls api.deliverStop then nextStopPathOrRoute + router.replace — identical to absent.tsx pattern that is end-to-end verified.
absent.tsx: both markAbsentAndSms and markAbsentOnly redirect via nextStopPathOrRoute — consistent and symmetric with deliver.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (absent verified; deliver code-path verified, runtime path blocked by signature-canvas WebView limitation in web preview)

seed_data_creation: Reset stop 84f46d8e-d3d0-4d49-b579-1195be0418c1 on route 4fca5350-ddf4-40cb-8028-aae36f8d257d back to pending after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route 4fca5350-ddf4-40cb-8028-aae36f8d257d has 100+ pending stops; can be used for further flows. Signature canvas (react-native-signature-canvas) does not work in web preview — to verify deliver auto-advance end-to-end use Expo Go / native build, or mock signature via direct API call (POST /api/routes/{rid}/stops/{sid}/deliver) then assert next pending stop lookup logic.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature works as designed. The only 'failure' is the inability to draw on the signature canvas in headless web preview because the underlying RN WebView is not implemented for the web platform, which prevents readSignature from firing onOK. This is an environment limitation, not a bug in the feature.
